case_title: WILLIAM FREEMAN ET AL VS. MOSSER CO.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FREEMAN, WILLIAM GAMBLE, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSSER CO. $3,262.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,352.00, FOR DAMAGED PERSONAL PROPERTY & EXPENSES RELATED TO MOVE-OUT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MOSSER CO.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-09-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOSSER CO.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,897.00 FILED BY FREEMAN, WILLIAM GAMBLE, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT MOSSER CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FREEMAN, WILLIAM GAMBLE, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT MOSSER CO.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FREEMAN, WILLIAM GAMBLE, KEVIN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MOSSER CO.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM FREEMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MOSSER CO. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CAROL ROHAN, PROPERTY MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
